result.reason: The configuration panel, once closed or hidden, becomes inaccessible to the user, hindering application configuration.
result.approach: Investigate the instantiation and display logic of the configuration panel (FrmOptions), ensuring it can be consistently reopened after being closed or hidden. This may involve reviewing event handlers, visibility flags, and resource management.
